name: get_current_time
description: Return the current date and time as a structured, timezone-aware temporal context. Call this whenever the answer depends on the current date or time (today's date, what day of the week it is, relative dates like 'in 3 days', deadlines, or time in another timezone). Do not answer time-sensitive questions from training knowledge.

timezone.description: Optional IANA timezone name to express the time in, e.g. 'Asia/Tokyo'. Defaults to the session timezone.
